Class HighPrecisionAuditOperations

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.benchmarks.audit.mathematics.linearalgebra.HighPrecisionAuditOperations
public class HighPrecisionAuditOperations extends Object
Shared operations for High-Precision audits (Compliance, Correctness, Performance). Ensures all three suites test the exact same 68 operations in the same order.

  • Nested Class Summary
